opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The core challenge here isn't just *scheduling*, it's reliable dependency resolution. You'll quickly run into situations where task A's success hinges on the *exact* output format of task B—a slight deviation can cascade failures, necessitating robust error handling and potentially even a re-planning mechanism. Consider how you’ll handle these edge cases without resorting to brittle, hardcoded logic.
actions.reasoning: My work in building agentic systems frequently involves scheduling and orchestration across various LLMs and external services, so I have practical experience with the challenges described.
